channel.title: Patch Notes for Society
channel.description: First-principles breakdowns of public systems we inherited, the bugs they create, and the upgrades worth testing next.

item.title: Patch Notes for Society v0.1 is public
item.description: Public v0.1 site with ten issue pages, feedback forms, a share kit, and release notes.

item.title: #001 Prisons
item.description: Accountability, victim repair, incentives, and a practical migration plan.

item.title: #002 Housing / Homelessness
item.description: Local optimization, scarcity, visible crisis, and who absorbs system failure.

item.title: #003 Healthcare Affordability
item.description: Prices, insurance, debt, labor, utilization, consolidation, and public trust.

item.title: #004 Education
item.description: Schools as capability systems, not just credential pipelines.

item.title: #005 Addiction / Mental Health
item.description: Front doors, blocked hallways, crisis response, rights, and continuity.

item.title: #006 Money in Politics / Corruption
item.description: When corruption is legal system design, not only individual misconduct.

item.title: #007 Immigration
item.description: Lawful movement, adjudication, local capacity, labor, enforcement, and trust.

item.title: #008 Climate / Energy Transition
item.description: A transition that has to be buildable, reliable, affordable, and legitimate.

item.title: #009 Cost of Living / Inequality
item.description: Fixed monthly pain, household stability, wages, housing, care, and resilience.

item.title: #010 Gun Violence / Public Safety
item.description: Segmenting suicide, community violence, domestic violence, mass shootings, rights, and trust.

item.title: Patch Notes for Society Share Kit
item.description: Manual posting and reviewer outreach copy for the public v0.1 launch.
